title: W.W. Grainger (GWW) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: DCF analysis for W.W. Grainger using 10-year FCF projections to estimate fair value against current market prices.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: Estimated at 4-5% over the near term, reflecting historical trends (like the 0.045 revenue growth observed) and stable end-market demand.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: Estimated at 2.0%, aligning with long-term macroeconomic GDP growth and recognizing the maturity of the industrial supply market.
assumptions.discountRate: Estimated at 10.0%, reflecting the company's relatively stable risk profile given a beta of 1.092 and its robust free cash flows.
